name: Files
summary: The Files collector gathers data about managed devices' file systems.

fields.name: name
fields.description: The file name.

fields.name: dir
fields.description: The directory path where the file is located.

fields.name: full_name
fields.description: The fully qualified file name, including its path.

fields.name: size
fields.description: File size in bytes.

fields.name: last_write
fields.description: The last time the operating system wrote the file.

fields.name: md5
fields.description: The file's content, in MD5 format.

fields.name: sha1
fields.description: The file's content, in SHA-1 format.

fields.name: sha256
fields.description: The file's content, in SHA-256 format.

fields.name: created_at
fields.description: Time stamp when the file was created.

fields.name: deleted_at
fields.description: Time stamp when the file was deleted.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Shows current for files that are currently on the file system, or deleted for files that were removed from the file system.

fields.name: create_process_pid
fields.description: Process ID of the process that created the file.

fields.name: create_process_sha256
fields.description: SHA-256 hash of the process that created the file.

fields.name: create_process_full_path
fields.description: Full path of the process that created the file.

fields.name: modify_process_pid
fields.description: Process ID of the process that modified the file.

fields.name: modify_process_sha256
fields.description: SHA-256 hash of the process that modified the file.

fields.name: modify_process_full_path
fields.description: Full path of the process that modified the file.

fields.name: delete_process_pid
fields.description: Process ID of the process that deleted the file.

fields.name: delete_process_sha256
fields.description: SHA-256 hash of the process that deleted the file.

fields.name: delete_process_full_path
fields.description: Full path of the process that deleted the file.

fields.name: create_user_domain
fields.description: Domain name of the user executing the process that created the file.

fields.name: create_user_name
fields.description: Name of the user executing the process that created the file.

fields.name: create_user_id
fields.description: ID of the user executing the process that created the file.

fields.name: modify_user_domain
fields.description: Domain name of the user executing the process that modified the file.

fields.name: modify_user_name
fields.description: Name of the user executing the process that modified the file.

fields.name: modify_user_id
fields.description: ID of the user executing the process that modified the file.

fields.name: delete_user_domain
fields.description: Domain name of the user executing the process that deleted the file.

fields.name: delete_user_name
fields.description: Name of the user executing the process that deleted the file.

fields.name: delete_user_id
fields.description: ID of the user executing the process that deleted the file.

examples.title: Example: Show files in the C:\Windows\Boot\DVD\EVE\ path.
Discover if the DLP extension is installed
examples.v2_query:
Files created_at, last_write, name
     WHERE Files full_name contains "hddjhjcbioambdhjejhdlobijkdnbggp"

examples.title: Hunting for Indicators Of Compromise - IoCs: hashes
examples.v2_query:
Files sha256, created_at, name
    WHERE Files sha256 equals "af0555109dfa352a7aafb70c3f63e8411b6cf8efe3398f99de55365efb34688e"
        OR Files sha256 equals "fa11c41dbec328a4b75aaf7e6b349c872948203e0109aea6ba6686780b34c85f"
        OR Files sha256 equals "1d2bae6f14d7cdeaa2ee1819d352eca0978538387ae174e52ef2228034f362c3"
        OR Files sha256 equals "51d3563c7aa0c4752bc8ce9c1d6d18b5f2d61d91358c71a4de16803c5fa1f877"
